prerequisites.value: Critical Focus, Weapon Focus ( scimitar ), character level 7th, worshiper of a good deity.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you confirm a critical hit against an undead creature, your attack bypasses all DR, deals full damage to incorporeal creatures, and acts as though it has the flaming burst weapon special ability. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: Whenever you threaten a critical hit against an undead creature, you can spend up to 4 stamina points to gain a +1 bonus per stamina point spent to confirm the critical hit.
